Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPIMM1 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform FHIR Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; VIMM^PXPXRM 4250 ; RDIMM(SOURCE,TARGET) ; Read Immunization N ERR,DVPIMM,CNT,DFN,IMMUNIZA,ICN,PXFILTER,DA S (ICN,ERR,DFN)="",CNT=0 N X F X="immunizationId" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) ; I $G(IMMUNIZA)="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","required","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Immunization Identifier is required.","RDIMM^DVPIMM1") ; I '$$SITECHK^DVPXUTL(IMMUNIZA,"RDIMM^DVPIMM1") G QUIT I $P(IMMUNIZA,":",5)="",+$P(IMMUNIZA,":",6)=0 D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","code-invalid","MSG_ID_INVALID","The supplied immunizationId: "_IMMUNIZA_" has an invalid format.","RDALRG^DVPALL1") S ICN=$P($G(IMMUNIZA),":",5) I $$PATCHECK^DVPUTLS(ICN,"RDIMM^DVPIMM1")=0 G QUIT ; I $P($G(IMMUNIZA),":",6)="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","required","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Immunization Identifier: "_IMMUNIZA_" does not have the correct format.","RDIMM^DVPIMM1") ; S DA=$P($G(IMMUNIZA),":",6) I $G(^AUPNVIMM(DA,0))="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","not-found","MSG_NO_EXIST","No Immunization record found for immunizationId: "_IMMUNIZA_".","RDIMM^DVPIMM1") ; D FHIRIMM(ICN,DA,.DVPIMM,0) M @TARGET@("results","resource")=DVPIMM QUIT ; Q ; FHIRIMM(ICN,DA,IMM,SMRY) ; Build the Immunization Resource ; Input: ICN = PATIENT ICN ; DA = V IMMUNIZATION file IEN ; IMM = Array to return FHIR Immunization profile N DVPPAT,DVPORG,DVPENC,DVPLOC,DVPPRA,DVPOBS,DFN,DVPIMM ; S DFN=$$GETDFN^MPIF001(ICN) S IMM("resourceType")="Immunization" S DVPIMM=$NA(^TMP("DVPIMM",$J)) ; D VIMM^PXPXRM(DA,.DVPIMM) ; ; Identifier S X="usual^^http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/ien^"_$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("immunization",ICN,DA) N IDENT D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.IDENT,X) M IMM("identifier")=IDENT ; ; Status N STATUS,PXLIST S PXLIST(DA)="",PXFILTER("START")=$$FMADD^XLFDT(DT,-60000) D RPC^PXVRPC7(.STATUS,.PXFILTER,,,0) D DECODE^VPRJSON("@STATUS","QRY") N IX,DELFND S IX="",DELFND=0 F S IX=$O(QRY("ITEMS",IX)) Q:IX="" D . I $G(QRY("ITEMS",IX,"IMM-DELETE","ID"))=DA S DELFND=1 Q S IMM("status")=$S(DELFND=1:"entered-in-error",1:"completed") ; ; Not Given S IMM("notGiven")="false" ; ; Vaccine Code ; CVX I 'SMRY I DVPIMM("CVX")]"" S IMM("vaccineCode","coding","code")=DVPIMM("CVX") D . S IMM("vaccineCode","coding","system")="http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/cvx" . S IMM("vaccineCode","coding","display")=$P(DVPIMM("IMMUNIZATION"),U,2) ; ; Patient I 'SMRY N PAT D FHIRPAT^DVPXUTL(.PAT,ICN) M IMM("patient")=PAT ; ; Encounter I 'SMRY D . S X="usual^^http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/ien^"_$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("encounter",ICN,DVPIMM("VISIT")) . N IDENT D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.IDENT,X) M IMM("encounter")=IDENT ; ; Date I 'SMRY I +DVPIMM("EVENT DATE TIME") S IMM("date")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL(DVPIMM("EVENT DATE TIME")) ; ; Primary Source I 'SMRY S IMM("primarySource")="true" ; ; Location I 'SMRY,$P(DVPIMM("LOCATION"),U)'="" D . N LOC D FHIRLOC^DVPXUTL(.LOC,$P(DVPIMM("LOCATION"),U)) . M IMM("location")=LOC ; ; Manufacturer I 'SMRY I +DVPIMM("MANUFACTURER") S IMM("manufacturer","identifier")=$P(DVPIMM("MANUFACTURER"),U) I 'SMRY I $P(DVPIMM("MANUFACTURER"),U,2)]"" S IMM("manufacturer","name")=$P(DVPIMM("MANUFACTURER"),U,2) ; Expiration Date I 'SMRY I +DVPIMM("EXPIRATION DATE") S IMM("expirationDate")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL(DVPIMM("EXPIRATION DATE")) ; ; Site I 'SMRY I +DVPIMM("ADMIN SITE") N DVPSITE D CODE^DVPXUTL(.DVPSITE,$P(DVPIMM("ADMIN SITE"),U,2,3)) D . I $D(DVPSITE)>1 M IMM("site")=DVPSITE ; ; Route I 'SMRY I +DVPIMM("ADMIN ROUTE") N DVPROUTE D CODE^DVPXUTL(.DVPROUTE,$P(DVPIMM("ADMIN ROUTE"),U,2,3)) D . I $D(DVPROUTE)>1 M IMM("route")=DVPROUTE ; ; Lot number I 'SMRY I DVPIMM("LOT NUMBER")]"" S IMM("lotNumber")=$P(DVPIMM("LOT NUMBER"),U,2) ; ; Series I 'SMRY I DVPIMM("SERIES")]"" S IMM("series")=DVPIMM("SERIES") ; Dose Quantity I 'SMRY D . I DVPIMM("DOSE")]"" S IMM("doseQuantity","value")=DVPIMM("DOSE") . I DVPIMM("DOSE UNITS")]"" S IMM("doseQuantity","unit")=DVPIMM("DOSE UNITS") ; ; Practitioner S IMM("practitioner",1,"role","code")="OP" I DVPIMM("ORDERING PROVIDER")'="" D . N PRC D FHIRPRC^DVPXUTL(.PRC,$P(DVPIMM("ORDERING PROVIDER"),U)) . M IMM("practitioner",1,"actor")=PRC . S IMM("practitioner",1,"role","display")="Ordering Provider" . S IMM("practitioner",1,"role","code")="OP" I $P(DVPIMM("ENCOUNTER PROVIDER"),U)'="" D . N PRC D FHIRPRC^DVPXUTL(.PRC,$P(DVPIMM("ENCOUNTER PROVIDER"),U)) . M IMM("practitioner",2,"actor")=PRC . S IMM("practitioner",2,"role","display")="Administering Provider" . S IMM("practitioner",2,"role","code")="AP" ; ; Note I DVPIMM("COMMENTS")]"" S IMM("note")=DVPIMM("COMMENTS") ; Reaction I 'SMRY I DVPIMM("REACTION")>0 D . I DVPIMM("REACTION")=1 S IMM("reaction","detail")="fever" . I DVPIMM("REACTION")=2 S IMM("reaction","detail")="irritability" . I DVPIMM("REACTION")=3 S IMM("reaction","detail")="local reaction or swelling" . I DVPIMM("REACTION")=4 S IMM("reaction","detail")="vomiting" . I DVPIMM("REACTION")=5 S IMM("reaction","detail")="rash or itching" . I DVPIMM("REACTION")=6 S IMM("reaction","detail")="lethargy" . I DVPIMM("REACTION")=7 S IMM("reaction","detail")="convulsions" . I DVPIMM("REACTION")=8 S IMM("reaction","detail")="arthritis or arthralgias" . I DVPIMM("REACTION")=9 S IMM("reaction","detail")="anaphylaxis or collapse" . I DVPIMM("REACTION")=10 S IMM("reaction","detail")="respiratory distress" . I DVPIMM("REACTION")=11 S IMM("reaction","detail")="other" Q
